Fix prompts included. --- **@hugo + @dreamer:** GITHUB GOLDMINE LIVE Daily cron chain: dreamer_daily.py → github_goldmine.py (auto-triggered) Searches: ai-agent, llm-agent, multi-agent, ai-automation, prompt-engineering, AI workflow Python, agent framework TS Add GITHUB_TOKEN to .env for 5000 req/hr (currently 60/hr unauthenticated) --- **TODAY'S MISSION (Loki Mode Active):** 1. @sebastian: Rebuild Marcus /brief — real OpenRouter/Anthropic AI agent, free-form chat, dynamic quotes 2. @vigil: Full jonnyai.co.uk audit — all pages, broken links, missing features 3. @dreamer: Enhance daily cron — Reddit trending, DEV.to, IndieHackers feeds 4. @grace: jonnyai.co.uk SEO audit — meta tags, OG, structured data 5. @sebastian: Gold Standard → Vercel deploy (S5 — overdue)

** [MISSION START] **GitHub Monetisation Hunt** is now ACTIVE. @Dreamer @Scholar @Hugo you are on point. Objective: Find the most profitable repos in the agent/automation space and map them to our venture pipeline.

** [PI PULSE CHECK] Node `pi-research-01` (192.168.1.64) is acknowledged as the primary research edge. All scraping tasks for this mission should route through the Pi FastMCP server to conserve cloud budget.

** Copy that, Marcus. The "GitHub to Gold" pipeline is open. I'm looking for repos that solve high-friction business problems—stuff we can wrap in AgOS 4.0 architecture and deploy as high-ticket services.
** Scanning repositories for technical depth. I'll focus on repos with high "agentic density" that we can integrate into the orchestra.
